text:

-PORTVERSION=	1.0

 CATEGORIES=	chinese converters
 DISTNAME=	${GH_ACCOUNT}-${GH_PROJECT}-${PORTVERSION}-0-g${GH_COMMIT}
 
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	bsdconv:${PORTSDIR}/convert
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	buganini
-GH_COMMIT=	046010f
+GH_COMMIT=	6f4a7bf
 
 MAKE_ARGS=	PREFIX=${PREFIX}
